name: Gurrek Ironheart
sd_appearance: A towering orc, Gurrek Ironheart, stands guard on the Mudflats, his deep green-grey skin weathered by countless battles. His prominent tusks curl down from a rough, scarred face that betrays a hint of sadness beneath his stern exterior. He wears chainmail armour, the faction's ash grey chainmail adorned with the Wardens of Ash badge, and a matching ash-mark graces his left cheek. A warhammer and crossbow are strapped to his back, worn leather and chainmail suggesting a history of past contracts. A large, intricately-carved bone necklace, a symbol of his penance, hangs heavily around his neck, a testament to his motivation to atone for past mistakes and protect others.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
